content_completeness.evidence: 990 legacy objects accounted for by 930 canonical items plus 60 aliases; lostObjects=0

content_uniqueness.evidence: canonical validator: 22 IDs affected by 10 normalized-title groups; duplicate-body and semantic-body groups are zero

navigation_accuracy.evidence: 39 static typed-route rows and one executed root-navigation UI check passed; deeper route matrix remains unexecuted

scroll_stability.evidence: Home, Guide, Saved empty state and More passed bottom-gap, hittability and return-to-top checks; 9 deeper scenarios remain unexecuted

geo_consistency.evidence: 12 provinces, 29 cities and the shared canonical place catalog passed unit geo-integrity tests

official_source_coverage.evidence: official pages opened and their rendered content inspected; UWV remained inconclusive

media_completeness.evidence: place media audit resolves all 41 catalog entries through an explicit verified hero or the curated licensed hero registry

overall_readiness.formula: 20% completeness + 10% uniqueness + 25% navigation + 15% scroll + 10% geo + 10% official sources + 10% media
overall_readiness.warning: Navigation is static-only and scroll runtime did not execute; the score is not a release-pass claim.
